CustomField.formula: 'To see the SW template, please ensure a signed NDA is uploaded to the request.' + HYPERLINK('https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/15p5qbYtzLoNvYBQaU0EGU7VbpURHbn7i', 'NDA Templates is found here.')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Make sure you saved a copy of the document before editing it
CustomField.label: Similarweb template
